name: Silk Wrap Midi Dress
description: A flowing silk midi cut on the bias for effortless drape. The adjustable wrap silhouette flatters every figure, and a hidden waist tie keeps everything in place from brunch to black-tie.

name: Italian Leather Loafers
description: Hand-crafted in Tuscany from full-grain calfskin, these penny loafers are stitched to a leather sole and burnished by hand for a rich patina that only improves with wear.

name: Diamond Halo Pendant Necklace
description: A brilliant-cut center stone framed by a delicate halo of pave diamonds, set in solid 14k gold. Suspended from an adjustable link chain that layers beautifully with your favorite pieces.

name: Structured Leather Tote
description: Sculpted from vegetable-tanned leather with a hand-painted edge finish. Roomy enough for a 15-inch laptop yet refined enough for the boardroom, this tote is built to be your everyday companion.

name: Tailored Wool Blazer
description: A modern take on the classic single-breasted blazer. Half-canvas construction gives it structure while natural stretch keeps it comfortable through long days at the office and after-hours dinners.

name: Automatic Skeleton Watch
description: Reveal the mechanical heart of horology. A 21-jewel automatic movement, visible through both dial and caseback, keeps time on a scratch-resistant sapphire crystal. Numbered edition of 500.

name: Cashmere Ribbed Sweater
description: Spun from Grade-A Mongolian cashmere and knit on vintage machines for that unmistakable hand-feel. The relaxed fit and generous ribbing make this the sweater you'll reach for all season.
